failure_modes.cause: Local cooling at tubing junctions or impurities in TBAB/EG leading to salt crystallization
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement heat-tracing on all feed lines and install a 5-micron pre-filter

failure_modes.cause: Extended residence time in heating zones due to low flow rate (0.63 mL/min) and high T (120°C)
failure_modes.mitigation: Use a precise heating block with ±1°C control and minimize pre-heating zone length

failure_modes.cause: Low viscosity of DES at 120°C combined with very low system pressure drop (0.051 bar)
failure_modes.mitigation: Increase BPR setpoint to 5.0 bar to ensure pump head stability

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — crystallization/blockage leads to immediate overpressure or flow cessation
validation_experiments: Long-term stability run (24h) at 120°C with DES solvent to monitor for pressure increase (clogging indicator)
TGA/DSC analysis of the TBAB/EG mixture at 120°C to determine decomposition onset
Flow rate verification using gravimetric measurement at 5.0 bar BPR to confirm Q=0.628 mL/min
